_meta.description: Orthodox icon catalog. Each entry resolves an iconId referenced from Person, DailyCommemoration, or DailyCommemorationItem. Image files live under public/icons/ and are served as static assets by Next.js — the IconRef.src field is the public URL (e.g. /icons/icon-theotokos-vladimir.jpg). Curated via scripts/ingest/icons/fetch-wikimedia.ts from Wikimedia Commons.
_meta.license: Image files are public-domain or CC0 only. Attribution strings are factual provenance; captions are Theosis-owned editorial prose.
_meta.coverage: 24 icons (Phase 1): Christ Pantocrator, Theotokos of Vladimir, Rublev Trinity, the Twelve Great Feasts, and 8 major saints (Nicholas, John Chrysostom, Basil the Great, Mary of Egypt, Seraphim of Sarov, Sergius of Radonezh, Anthony the Great, George the Trophy-Bearer). Traditional Byzantine/Russian style; PD or CC0 only.
